Body.Content:
Learn about the state of your scanned repositories and create custom reports with the information protection scanner. Labeling, classification and protection actions on scanned files are stored in SQL tables that form a foundation to feed into custom reports.

GA date: June CY2026

Preview date: May CY2026

message.Title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Scanner data export for custom reporting
